title: More Nonsense Limerick 50
content:
There was an old man of Dumbree,
    Who taught little owls to drink tea;
    For he said, "To eat mice 
    Is not proper or nice,"
    That amiable man of Dumbree.
meaning:
"More Nonsense Limerick 50" is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
